message:
chore: bump version to 0.2.47 for release

81 commits since v0.2.46 — bugfixes, test coverage hardening,
fuzz harnesses, performance work, docs reality-check, and the
fastmcp 0.3 + frankensearch 0.3 migration completion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
